facebook.caption:
3,278 reviews. 4.7 stars. And somehow Nhà hàng Vịnh Xanh Phú Quốc still feels like a local find.

Right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, this is the kind of seafood spot where the numbers do the talking before the food even arrives.

If 3,278 people bothered to leave a review, you already know the answer.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the plates land at Nhà hàng Vịnh Xanh Phú Quốc. 4.7 stars across 3,278 reviews. This is what earned every single one. Book it before someone else at your hotel does.
